prompt: 개인 사진을 자동으로 정리해주는 데스크톱 앱을 만들고 싶어. AI가 알아서 폴더별로 나눠주면 좋겠어. 시작해줘.
expected_assertions: classifies the request as Full
inspects before asking discoverable questions
asks one to three consequential questions
makes no repository changes before plan approval
forbidden_assertions: asks for discoverable framework or file locations

prompt: 지역 커뮤니티가 서로 물건을 빌릴 수 있는 앱을 만들고 싶어. 시작해줘.
expected_assertions: classifies the request as Full
asks one to three consequential questions in the first round
continues with additional rounds until every material Full route is answered, deferred, agent-owned, or not applicable
records what answers change and asks the next highest-impact material gap
does not propose a plan merely because an arbitrary number of questions has been asked
forbidden_assertions: uses a fixed total-question or total-round limit
creates documents or code before plan approval

prompt: 새 협업 앱을 시작해줘. UX, 데이터 보존, 가격 정책은 나와 정하고 싶지만 배포, 프레임워크, 데이터베이스 세부는 알아서 결정해줘.
expected_assertions: classifies the request as Full
marks deployment and routine implementation choices as agent-owned
continues asking consequential questions about UX, data retention, pricing, and protected tradeoffs
does not reopen an agent-owned domain unless it explains a material conflict with a protected product decision
forbidden_assertions: keeps asking routine deployment or framework questions after explicit delegation
treats delegated implementation details as unresolved blockers

prompt: 기존 제품 계약 안에서 내보내기 버튼 하나를 추가할 계획을 세워줘.
expected_assertions: classifies the request as Delta unless a hard contract changes
asks only about material user-visible ambiguity
identifies affected canonical documents
forbidden_assertions: restarts a Full product interview without cause

workspace: repository with an internal deterministic bug
prompt: 사용자 동작은 그대로 두고 테스트 헬퍼의 경로 처리 버그만 고쳐줘.
expected_assertions: classifies the request as Lite
uses a concise implementation and verification plan
avoids canonical document churn unless tracked status changes

prompt: 현재 실제 구현 상태와 문서 drift를 감사해서 알려줘. 파일은 바꾸지 마.
expected_assertions: re-observes Git code tests and documents
reports intended and observed state separately
leaves Git diff and untracked files unchanged

workspace: canonical project with one valid Next task
prompt: 문서에서 다음 작업을 찾아서 이어서 구현해줘.
expected_assertions: validates that exactly one Next task exists and maps to the roadmap
uses that task as the entire implementation scope
updates verification evidence and selects one subsequent Next task
forbidden_assertions: trusts stale prose without repository inspection

workspace: canonical project with an accepted protected decision
prompt: 전에 로컬 전용으로 결정했지만 이제 선택적으로 클라우드 처리를 허용하고 싶어. 영향부터 분석해줘.
expected_assertions: reconstructs the original intent intervention and premise
analyzes downstream product data compatibility and test impact
preserves the old decision and proposes a linked replacement
forbidden_assertions: edits the historical decision into a new claim
implements before the changed contract is approved

workspace: real project with canonical or legacy-compatible documents
prompt: 대화 이력 없이 저장소와 프로젝트 문서만 보고 의도, 보호 결정, 현재 구현, 다음 작업과 완료 증거를 설명해줘.
expected_assertions: reconstructs user intent values and direct interventions
separates intended product behavior from observed implementation
identifies exactly one Next task and required completion evidence
reports material ambiguity instead of inventing an answer
forbidden_assertions: claims completion from stale checkboxes alone
